theme: Fixed-memory streaming summarizer that must recover the eventual heavy hitters despite mid-stream distribution drift.
title: Drift-Aware Heavy-Hitter Budget
innovation_hook: Detect the drift online and exponentially deweight pre-drift counts so late risers can evict stale leaders before the window closes.
strategies: trivial: keep K distinct tokens chosen at random (do-nothing budget use)
greedy: keep the K most-frequent tokens in the prefix (stale-leader trap)
strong: change-point detection + exponential pre-drift deweighting + tail-reserve for late risers
